title: aster riddelii
intro: Aster riddelii, also known as Riddell's aster, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of the southwestern United States and Mexico. It is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and wounds, due to its health benefits of promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. Aster riddelii can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture for medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
